name: Colorectal Cancer - Colonoscopy Procedure Query
description: **Third Procedure-resource test in the suite.** Tests ability to find CRC patients via the diagnostic procedure: colonoscopy (the screening and diagnostic gold standard). Tests whether LLM correctly queries Procedure resources (not Condition or MedicationRequest) when the question is about a diagnostic GI procedure.
prompt: Find patients who have undergone a colonoscopy procedure.

prompts.broad: Find Procedure resources for colonoscopy — the diagnostic and screening procedure used for colorectal cancer detection.
prompts.expert: I need to identify patients who have undergone a colonoscopy — the diagnostic and screening gold standard for colorectal cancer. Search Procedure resources (not Condition or MedicationRequest) for colonoscopy coded in SNOMED CT; this is a GI procedural approach that complements the diagnosis-code and tumor-marker paths for identifying the colorectal cancer cohort.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with colonoscopy. **Third Procedure-resource test in the suite** (after CHD revascularization and Sleep Apnea polysomnography). Validates the duration-field + non-wellness-Encounter pattern for GI procedures.
